citations.narrative:
There were live mice observed in the feeders of 3 enclosures housing a total of eleven pigs. The mice were eating the
pigs' feed and scattered when the humans walked by. The facility will be closing soon and will no longer house animals
and the facility representatives confirmed that certain pest control methods have already been discontinued.
Mammalian pests may contaminate food fed to covered animals through their excreta or may be a source of disease or
injury through other routes. A safe and effective program for the control of insects, ectoparasites, and avian and
mammalian pests shall be established and maintained by the facility. Correct by: May 15, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
n

narrative:
3.131(d) 
   
Sanitation. 
There were live mice observed in the feeders of 3 enclosures housing a total of eleven pigs. The mice were eating the 
pigs' feed and scattered when the humans walked by. The facility will be closing soon and will no longer house animals 
and the facility representatives confirmed that certain pest control methods have already been discontinued.  
 
Mammalian pests may contaminate food fed to covered animals through their excreta or may be a source of disease or 
injury through other routes. A safe and effective program for the control of insects, ectoparasites, and avian and 
mammalian pests shall be established and maintained by the facility. Correct by: May 15, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the facility representatives.
